action.reason: Gen T19 Nils Larkspur is a new fence in town. He should have a reason for arriving recently.

quest.name: New Fence's Business
quest.description: Nils Larkspur has just arrived from the dock district to fence goods. He's looking to make a few shady deals.
quest.reward: A good reputation and an extra five silver.
objectives: Talk to Nils and get his backstory. Find out why he's in town so soon.

action.fact: Finn noticed a shadowy figure moving towards the north gate last night. He dismissed it at the time, but now wonders if the hooded figure near the lighthouse and the shadowy figure are the same person. He knows the lighthouse is dark and something is at the Shoals, but he doesn't know what. He feels uneasy and wants to find out more.

similarity_warning.matches_text: Finn has been keeping a secret: a hooded figure was seen climbing the lighthouse path three nights ago. He wants to find out what's at the Shoals and join a crew to sail past it.

action.reason: Captain Reva examined the cargo of the last ship to dock, noticing the sealed black glass jars with faintly glowing markings.
action.event: Captain Reva took a closer look at the crates of the last ship to dock, noting the sealed black glass jars with faintly glowing markings. She frowned, her hands trembling as she recalled the lighthouse keeper's disappearance and the dark lighthouse. She decided to have her dock workers search the crates for any signs of smuggling tunnels.
